title: The Bleeding Eye
wikitext:
[]: The Bleeding Eye             Quote Post by Rensetsu » Tue Oct 17, 2006 8:22 pm Split off from The most disturbing moment in Evangelion . -Reichu For some reason, in EoE, when Asuka's EVA gets penetrated in the eye, then it switches to the frams where blood is pouring out of her eye always messes with me. I know there are a lot of other ones that probable mess with me too. I just think every idea coming out of Asuka's mind while she is going crazy and hates everyone...........I don't know I just think it is too messed up.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 18, 2006 10:00 am Rensetsu wrote: For some reason, in EoE, when Asuka's EVA gets penetrated in the eye, then it switches to the frams where blood is pouring out of her eye always messes with me.

[]:             Quote Post by Rensetsu » Wed Oct 18, 2006 2:15 pm Reichu wrote: Rensetsu wrote: For some reason, in EoE, when Asuka's EVA gets penetrated in the eye, then it switches to the frams where blood is pouring out of her eye always messes with me.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Thu Oct 19, 2006 12:01 am Ah I did not know that. I slowed down my DVD and it looked like there was an empty hole there..........I must check again!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 19, 2006 1:11 pm Eternal Yamcha wrote: Of course I haven't seen EoE since February... And haven't watched it while being fully awake since... Ever. I'm about 99% sure someone's got a screen cap or two and that they'll most likely post it here to clear it up.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Oct 19, 2006 1:30 pm Reichu wrote: (Click for bigger)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 19, 2006 1:43 pm Mr. Tines wrote: That looks as much like the gout from one wound streaming from either side of the finger(s) over the wound as it does two separate wounds.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Oct 19, 2006 2:03 pm So what's with the conspicuous absence of LCL there?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 19, 2006 2:05 pm Because LCL behaves as a gas whenever artistic license requires it. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Rensetsu » Thu Oct 19, 2006 2:26 pm Reichu wrote: Eternal Yamcha wrote: Of course I haven't seen EoE since February... And haven't watched it while being fully awake since... Ever. I'm about 99% sure someone's got a screen cap or two and that they'll most likely post it here to clear it up.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Oct 19, 2006 2:38 pm Reichu wrote: What fingers?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 19, 2006 2:53 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Still the stream looks rather |U| (upside down) shaped, like it's splitting from a single source, sympathetic effects notwithstanding.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Oct 19, 2006 2:56 pm But why are the streams of blood there in the first place? This isn't the Matrix and there are no spoons to be found, so what's with the riduculous your-mind-makes-it-real angle? Don't tell me; it must be artistic license again.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Oct 19, 2006 2:57 pm Yeah, it's hard to tell the difference.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 19, 2006 3:04 pm BobBQ wrote: But why are the streams of blood there in the first place?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Oct 19, 2006 3:27 pm BobBQ wrote: But why are the streams of blood there in the first place?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Oct 19, 2006 5:33 pm MaggotMaster wrote: BobBQ wrote: But why are the streams of blood there in the first place?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Oct 19, 2006 7:16 pm Reichu wrote: Because LCL behaves as a gas whenever artistic license requires it. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Oct 19, 2006 10:25 pm Ornette wrote: I think he means why is there liquid inside of a liquid medium (LCL).

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Thu Oct 19, 2006 10:29 pm Ah thank you, now I don't have to slow it down on a bigger screen. Two wounds..........can I still be freaked out that her arm got cut in two down the middle?
